description: Urban Compliance Rules — Gujarat GDCR 2017 & SUDA Development Plan 2035

rules.name: Water Body Buffer Zone
rules.description: No new construction within 500m of any water body (river, lake, canal)

rules.name: Green Belt Protection
rules.description: No construction or land alteration permitted in designated Green Belt zones

rules.name: Minimum Vegetation Cover
rules.description: Green cover in residential zones must not decrease below 30%

rules.name: Tapi Riverfront Buffer
rules.description: No construction within 500m of the Tapi Riverfront development zone
rules.legal_reference: Surat GDCR — Tapi Riverfront Special Regulation

rules.name: Industrial Zone Restriction
rules.description: Industrial activity and heavy construction prohibited in Zone R1 (Residential)
